demo.title: video.sh
demo.code:
# Dry-run first — needs no key, prints the exact Replicate request
node video.mjs --prompt "a paper boat drifting down a rain gutter, slow push-in" --dry-run

# Text-to-video — bring your own Replicate key
REPLICATE_API_TOKEN=r8_xxx node video.mjs \
  --prompt "a paper boat drifting down a rain gutter, slow push-in" --out out/boat.mp4

# Image-to-video from a first frame
REPLICATE_API_TOKEN=r8_xxx node video.mjs \
  --prompt "camera orbits the character" --image in/frame.png --out out/orbit.mp4

setup: Node 18+ — uses built-in fetch, zero dependencies (no npm install)
Bring your own Replicate API token: export REPLICATE_API_TOKEN (get one at https://replicate.com/account/api-tokens). Generation is billed to your Replicate account, not MythosForge.
Default model bytedance/seedance-2.0; override with --model (pass --image-field for models outside the built-in map). Verify with `--dry-run` (needs no key) first.
